nasb.text: Nebuchadnezzar the king to all the peoples, nations, and men of every language that live in all the earth: “May your peace abound!

esv.text: King Nebuchadnezzar to all peoples, nations, and languages, that dwell in all the earth: Peace be multiplied to you!

cnv.text: 尼布甲尼撒王向住在全地的各國、各族和說各種語言的人宣告說：“願你們大享平安！

ccb.text: 尼布甲尼撒王传谕天下各族、各邦、各语种的人：“愿你们大享平安！
